LanguageData.VQED_AncientPassiveLamp.description: A passive illumination device. Emits a faint glow thanks to decaying long-life cells.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientPassiveLamp.label: uralt passive lamp
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloFloodlight.description: A high-output floodlight installed for emergency lighting. Dims rapidly without reliable power.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloFloodlight.label: uralt silo floodlight
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloLamp.description: A hard-wired light source installed in the facility. Still capable of emitting weak light.
LanguageData.VQED_AncientSiloLamp.label: uralt silo lamp
